content: Core principle: Conversations are the source of truth for intent. Everything else is derived. The system exists because intent is generated continuously through conversation but never persists — it evaporates between sessions. The goal is to close the loop: capture raw signal, distil it into structured intent, and maintain a living record that future agents can reason against. The hardest problem in agentic development isn't generating code — it's ensuring that code generated at T+N still respects decisions made at T.

provenance.raw_agent: This reframes everything. The inbox isn't a messaging utility — it's the mouth of the pipeline.
